features: **Advanced Whitening Technology:** This Oral B toothpaste features cutting-edge tooth whitening technology that effectively removes surface stains, delivering a brighter smile with every use in the comfort of your own home.

**Comprehensive Plaque Removal:** Specifically designed as a plaque remover for teeth, this toothpaste ensures thorough cleaning to help maintain optimal oral hygiene while preventing tooth decay and gum disease.

**Exclusive 3-Pack Bundle:** The three-pack bundle offers excellent value by combining three tubes of premium Oral B Protect & Clean toothpaste, providing long-lasting supply and consistent oral care results for your entire family.

*Tooth Whitening with Gentle Care:* Experience gentle but effective tooth whitening with these fluoride-enriched formulations that not only whiten but also protect enamelr s fotronger, healthier-looking teeth over time.

*Trusted Brand Assurance from Oral B:* Utilizing cutting-edge research in oral hygiene, each tube of this newly enhanced tooth paste bundle underscores Oral B’s commitment to delivering superior cleaning and whitening results for confident smiles.
description: Product description Elevate your oral care routine with the Toothpaste Oral B Protect & Clean - Pack Whitening Toothpaste Bundle, designed to deliver a fresher and brighter smile with every brush. This exceptional bundle provides three tubes of Oral B’s advanced whitening toothpaste, meticulously formulated to be a powerful plaque remover for teeth while emphasizing superior tooth whitening capabilities. Harnessing the trusted expertise of Oral B, one of the leading brands in dental care, this toothpaste will help you achieve a noticeably whiter smile and maintain optimal oral health. Each tube in this value-packed bundle is crafted to efficiently target and lift surface stains caused by everyday factors such as coffee, tea, and wine. The active ingredients work synergistically not only as an effective plaque remover but also as a protective barrier against new stain formation. Our unique formula gently polishes your teeth's enamel while safeguarding them against cavities — offering comprehensive oral hygiene benefits that go beyond common expectations for toothpaste. With consistent use, the Oral B Protect & Clean Whitening Toothpaste reveals significantly brighter teeth without compromising tooth enamel integrity. Included in this MS Bundle is a thoughtful Thank You card as our token of appreciation for choosing premium dental care products that enhance your confidence and ensure your satisfaction. Make the smart switch today to Oral B Toothpaste for unparalleled cleaning performance and impressive whitening results that remind you why our brand remains synonymous with quality worldwide. Discover why countless users trust Oral B as their go-to solution when it comes to top-tier tooth paste innovations designed just for you — because your smile deserves nothing less than excellence! Directions Apply a pea-sized amount of toothpaste to your toothbrush. Brush your teeth thoroughly for at least two minutes, focusing on all areas of your mouth, including the front, back, and chewing surfaces of your teeth. Rinse your mouth with water after brushing. Use twice daily for optimal results. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not swallow., Keep out of reach of children., Discontinue use and consult a dentist if irritation occurs. See more
